title: Cobblemon Roboto Candy
description: Add some extra candy to lower your pokemon's level
body:
This mod adds candy to control your pokemon's level.

Candy added:

Roboto Candy (roboto_candy:roboto_candy): Reduces your Pokémon's levels by 10.

Super Roboto Candy (roboto_candy:super_roboto_candy): Reduces your Pokémon's levels by 20.

![Reduce Level](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6746553abe9fffaa70fae31af064a0792227368c.png)

![Reduce Level Limit](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/809061df59548a3a7818346be1af9694dfc04835.png)
